---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability privately
labels: security
---

If you have discovered a security issue, do NOT open a public issue with exploit details. Please follow the instructions in SECURITY.md and email hello@webcertainty.com.au to request a secure reporting channel, including:

- affected commit or version
- environment and prerequisites
- short reproducible steps or PoC
- expected vs observed behavior

The maintainers will acknowledge and handle the report promptly.
